label.purpose: Controls, metadata, and explicit state text.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Menus, dialogs, and sticky controls only.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, selected, and pressed feedback.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action in a task region.

components.name: Text Input
components.css: .ds-field{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:6px;color:#AEB6AE;font:650 13px system-ui}.ds-field span{grid-column:1/-1}.ds-field input{min-height:44px;border:1px solid #303734;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px;background:#131716;color:#F2F3EE;font:600 15px system-ui}.ds-field input:focus-visible{outline:2px solid #70C8C3;outline-offset:2px}.ds-field small{align-self:center;color:#AEB6AE}

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: A labeled destination with a restrained selected state.
components.html: ホーム

components.name: Sync Status
components.description: An explicit state sentence with recovery context.
components.html: !クラウド未接続記録はこの端末に保存されます

narrative.overview: A calm, dark instrument bench beside a working roaster. Task sequence, explicit state, and dependable numeric data carry the experience; decoration never competes with the roast.

rules.name: Copper Budget
rules.body: Copper occupies less than ten percent of a routine screen.

rules.name: State Sentence
rules.body: Semantic color always appears with an icon and plain-language status.

rules.name: Bench
rules.body: If spacing and a divider explain the group, it is not a card.

dos: Do make the next useful action visible in the initial viewport.
Do keep touch targets at least 44 by 44 CSS pixels.
donts: Don't use marketing hero composition or generic AI/SaaS card grids.
Don't use neon cyberpunk styling, purple gradients, decorative grids, glassmorphism, backdrop blur, constant glow, or gradient text.
